name: Greenhouse Kebabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the aubergine and pepper into chunks; cut the onions into wedges.
2. Slice the courgettes into 1-to-1-1/2-inch lengths; leave the mushrooms whole.
3. Mix together all flavoring ingredients.
4. Toss the vegetables in the flavorings and marinate for 2 to 4 hours.
5. Prepare the sauce: Chop the onion and garlic roughly, then whizz them in a food processor or blender with the coriander seeds. Add the chili, oil, and anchovy essence and whizz again. Add the peanut butter, lemon juice, and honey and process once more. Scrape the puree into a small saucepan, cover, and set aside for at least 1 hour before cooking.
6. Thread the vegetables onto skewers and grill under moderate heat for 10-15 minutes, basting with the marinade liquid as necessary.
7. Meanwhile, add 5 tablespoons warm water to the pan of sauce and set it over medium heat. Cook at a steady bubble, stirring often, until the sauce is hot and aromatic. Reduce heat to a very low setting and cook for a few minutes longer, adding more water if necessary to achieve a good creamy consistency, and adjust seasoning to taste.
8. Serve the sauce separately.
